prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to a Garrett GT3076R with a 0.63 A/R turbine housing and 56mm compressor wheel, paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe (engine code: MultiAir 1.4L Turbo, *FCA code: 350A1000*) to target 280-300whp on E85 fuel with a supporting Cobb Accessport Stage 2+ tune and upgraded fuel system (Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump).

Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilover suspension kit (124 Spider-specific valving) with adjustable camber plates, spherical bearing front control arms (SPL Parts), and a Cusco 22mm rear sway bar to eliminate body roll and optimize turn-in response for the ND-chassis platform.

Lightweight flywheel (Fidanza 8.5lb aluminum) and Sachs Performance Stage 2 clutch kit with a reinforced pressure plate, paired with a Fidanza 1.5kg lightweight crank pulley to reduce rotational mass and improve throttle response on the *350A1000* engine.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (124 Spider-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a duckbill rear spoiler, finished in custom matte PPG 'Bianco Gelato' paint with gloss black accents on the lower cladding.

Custom 18x9.5 +25 and 18x10.5 +30 Enkei PF07 wheels in matte bronze, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) for aggressive stance and track-ready grip, paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with 355mm and 330mm rotors, respectively.

Full carbon fiber interior overhaul: Status Racing carbon fiber bucket seats (ND-chassis specific), NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel with a custom Alcantara-wrapped hub, and a custom roll cage (Autopower bolt-in 6-point cage) with carbon fiber door cards and a MOMO carbon fiber shift knob for weight reduction and motorsport aesthetics.
